prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic wet-market scene with a 2D anime-style female swordswoman composited naturally into the real environment. The character is a blue-haired anime swordswoman, sitting sideways on a beige plastic vegetable crate in the middle of a crowded Chinese indoor produce market, holding a bundle of long green scallions with both hands as if inspecting or buying them. She has very long deep navy blue hair in a high ponytail with loose strands, an ornate blue-and-white fantasy kimono-inspired outfit with layered sleeves, short white pleated skirt, dark arm guards, navy ankle wraps, sandals, gold trim and small tassel ornaments, plus a sheathed katana resting diagonally at her left side. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular blur, while the rest of her body is sharply illustrated. Add small yellow comic exclamation marks near the scallions to emphasize surprise or attention. The background is a realistic bustling produce market with wet reflective concrete floor, fluorescent tube lights overhead, shoppers and vendors with blurred faces, piles of leafy greens, baskets of tomatoes and peppers, and handwritten Chinese price signs reading 小葱 2.2元一斤 and 芹菜 2.2元一斤. Include two clearly visible price signs, many stacked vegetable baskets, and a sense of humid market atmosphere. Use a hybrid style: realistic documentary photography for the environment, detailed cel-shaded anime rendering for the character, believable lighting integration, slight depth of field, 16:9 composition, high detail, natural shadows, glossy wet floor reflections, urban slice-of-life mood, as if a fantasy game character casually visited a local vegetable market.
